headline: How The Cerence (CRNC) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Fair Value To US$10
summary: Cerence’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$12.50 to US$10.00, a roughly 20% cut that reflects an updated view of the story. Recent Street research has also moved closer to that US$10.00 level, as several firms reset their price targets around concerns about revenue growth and execution. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch in order to keep up with it. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full...
